reasoning: An analytic solution is available, so the primary criterion is the smallest relative L2 error. 'plan_spectral_64x64' achieves an L2 error of 5.41e-16, which is orders of magnitude smaller than all other plans. Its runtime (68.90s) is also faster than the next most accurate plan ('plan_fd_100x100', 80.58s), which has a much larger L2 error (1.96). The hp-FEM and multigrid FD plans are both less accurate and slower. Therefore, 'plan_spectral_64x64' is the clear best choice, balancing both accuracy and efficiency.
